page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance powered by the custom 64-core Alibaba YiTian710 ARM64 processor. Operating at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz, this instance features 64 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.c8y.16xlarge demonstrates strong multi-core performance and memory efficiency. The stress-ng multi-core CPU test and PassMark CPU physics test both register strong results, while the PassMark memory score reaches top-tier performance. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression also achieves top-tier status. Single-core performance, including stress-ng single-core and gzip compression, remains in the average tier. Database operations and Redis SET operations show strong throughput, making the instance highly capable for memory-bound and multi-threaded workloads.

The ARM64 architecture of the YiTian710 processor delivers high resource density, making this instance a cost-effective option for highly parallelizable workloads. The lack of local storage and GPU accelerators represents a tradeoff, positioning this server primarily for compute-heavy tasks that do not require local disk speed or hardware acceleration. It is highly suited for multi-threaded applications, database operations, and web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores powered by the 2.75 GHz ARM64 Alibaba YiTian710 processor. It is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps without local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmarks indicate strong multi-core CPU performance and top-tier memory performance, highlighted by exceptional multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and high PassMark memory scores. Single-core benchmarks and large-block memory bandwidth remain in the average tier. The ARM64 architecture offers high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for parallel workloads. This instance is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, database operations, and web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.16xlarge is a compute-optimized ARM64 server with 64 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.

tagline: A dedicated 64-core ARM64 compute-optimized instance delivering strong multi-threaded performance and high memory bandwidth for parallel workloads.

Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM and 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Delivers top-tier multi-threaded decompression and memory benchmark scores
Features dedicated physical cores with no hyperthreading overhead
Optimized for multi-threaded applications, database operations, and web serving
